title: Scene from RZMC - 1986 Horsetooth Mini Classic, Boys 14 - 15 Stage 3/3 Criterium

enrichment.summary: Race commentary from a 1986 youth criterium cycling event (Boys 14-15, Stage 3/3) at the Horsetooth Mini Classic, covering rider positions and race dynamics.
enrichment.speaker: other

claims.subject: riders
claims.claim: We split up, set through the rider's neck and going to the police.

claims.subject: award
claims.claim: Following the award, we'll be in September, ladies and gentlemen, set up all these riders today.

claims.subject: riders
claims.claim: Number 120 is playing a high-all group of two riders working together.

claims.subject: Number 107
claims.claim: Number 107 is being a grand-up, followed by 139 Chris Collins in.

transcript.text: In the back, Mark Sireen, followed by 130, Jewel Vitsky.
Group is split up. Second group of riders have to...
...the race unit, first hander, second of all these riders today.
Group of two riders working together.
Number 107, Stephen Branham, followed by 139, Chris Robinson.
